Banner.title: Software Developer
Banner.Description: I have 3 years of experience in web development and desktop application development. I focus on writing clean, reusable code across various technologies, applying best practices and development standards.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: In 3 years of experience, I have held various roles: web developer, desktop application developer. I enjoy using my skills to create innovative solutions that solve problems.
My skills include implementing system improvements, optimizing websites, standardizing models, and executing ideas that add value to the project I'm working on.
I also develop personal projects out of interest or utility.
Technologies I have worked with include (but are not limited to):
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Full Stack Developer
Description: Design and development of a multi-level network marketing digital platform with a commission system using modern technologies such as NestJS, Next.js, MySql, Stripe, and DocuSign.
Active contribution to the development of cross-functional company projects ( + 5 projects) using modern technologies such as Laravel, React, and React Native.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Freelance Laravel & REACT Developer
Description: Development of a Connect-Talent platform helping students find professional opportunities.
Creation of a showcase website for Securitec Surveillance.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Laravel Developer Intern
Description: Development of a web application for tracking production stakeholders.

Experience.Jobs.Title: NodeJS and React Developer
Description: Development of a school kit management software.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Java Swing Developer Intern
Description: Creation of a school inventory management application.

FeatureProjects.Title: My Projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Connect Talent Platform
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Participation in the development of an innovative web platform facilitating connections between students and professional opportunities, offering a smooth and high-performance user experience, built with modern technologies Laravel, React, and MySQL.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Securitec Surveillance Website
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Development of a showcase website for Securitec Surveillance, presenting professional security solutions, created with React.js and Tailwind CSS

OtherProjects.Title: Other Projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Housing Sales Management
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Development of a web application for housing sales management, accepting payment in two installments.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: E-commerce Web Application
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Creation of a web application to manage online customer purchases with both Customer and Admin/Seller interfaces.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Bank Customer Account Management Web Application
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Design and implementation of a web application for managing customer account creation and transactions in a bank.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Wholesale Sales Management
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Creation of sales management applications for a wholesaler with 2 different interfaces (Desktop, Web). These applications manage invoicing and sales statistics.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Student Management
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Implementation of a student management project. This application manages student grades.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Mobile Application for Student Merit Scholarship
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Creation of a mobile application for managing students eligible for a merit scholarship.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Employee Attendance Mobile Application
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Creation of a mobile application to validate employee attendance via QR-CODE scanning.

Contact.Title: Get In Touch!
Contact.Content: I would be delighted to discuss new opportunities with you. Write to me, and I will respond as soon as possible.
